title: Consistent Buckets + Melanoid
description: A version of Consistent Buckets that adds support for Melanoid Axolotls.
body:
Makes all buckets consistent with the Programmer Art bucket texture.

Shows the axolotl variant in a bucket (requires OptiFine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)). Separate textures for baby variants.

This version is compatible with Konci's [Melanoid Axolotls](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/melanoid-axolotls) resource pack. The base version of this resource pack can be downloaded [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-buckets).
